SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.ImportMissingLink: Link an Actor and/or Journal first.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.HintName: Display name used in this worldbuilding record.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.HintSummary: Short descriptive text. Can be pulled from linked Actor/Journal using the import button.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.HintTags: Comma-separated keywords for quick filtering (for example: noble, city, rumor).
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.HintLinks: UUID links, journal links, or URLs. Import can auto-add linked Actor/Journal UUID tags.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.HintLinkedActor: Optional: pick an Actor to pull summary text and avoid duplicate data entry.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.HintLinkedJournal: Optional: pick a Journal Entry to pull text content into Summary.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.HintMother: Character name used for inferred family relationships.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.HintFather: Character name used for inferred family relationships.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.HintConnections: One per line in the format: relationship: target (example: mentor: Aria).

CategoryHelp.locations: places, landmarks, regions, and settlement notes.
CategoryHelp.characters: people and NPC profiles, plus their relationships.
CategoryHelp.factions: organizations, guilds, nations, and their goals.
CategoryHelp.plots: active story threads, hooks, and unresolved events.

SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.ExampleSummary: Example: Captain of the city watch. Known for strict but fair judgment.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.ConnectionFormatHint: Derived relationships update from parent fields + direct connection lines.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.SettingsDataHint: Internal storage for Scabard-style worldbuilding records.
SCABARD-WORLDBUILDER.SettingsMenuHint: Open the worldbuilding workspace for this world.
